'''bsl_adj''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "stative adjective root".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-l
|-
! Word class
| Adjective
|-
! Gloss
| stative adjective root
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| positive || bosalasha
|-
| comparative || bosasalasha
|-
| superlative || besælasha
|-
| negative || bosfalasha
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Words fb8fd09]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 8692abf]]
{{wordpage|v1}}
